chapters.title: Descriptive vs Inferential Statistics
chapters.transcript: Descriptive: mean, median, mode, standard deviation. Inferential: drawing conclusions about population from samples.

chapters.title: Confidence Intervals
chapters.transcript: A 95% confidence interval means if we repeat sampling, 95% of intervals contain true parameter. Margin of error.

chapters.title: Hypothesis Testing Basics
chapters.transcript: Null H0 vs alternative H1. p-value: probability of observed data if H0 true. Type I and Type II errors.

chapters.title: T-tests and ANOVA
chapters.transcript: One-sample, two-sample, paired t-tests. ANOVA compares more than two group means.

chapters.title: Chi-square Tests
chapters.transcript: Goodness-of-fit and independence tests for categorical data. Contingency tables.
